description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a low profile and sporty proportions. The exterior is predominantly teal with prominent branding, including a Coca-Cola logo on the roof, a Fortnite decal and number 7 on the left side, and a Tesla logo on the right side. The front grille is wide and aggressive, flanked by angular headlights, while the rear showcases dual exhausts and a subtle integrated spoiler. The windows are tinted black, and the wheels are solid black with a low-profile tire design. The car's overall appearance suggests a blend of luxury and performance, with visual cues from both Audi and Tesla.
description: A teal, sporty coupe car with blacked-out windows, bold branding decals, and a streamlined, performance-oriented design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, angular headlights, and a Coca-Cola logo on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the Fortnite decal, number 7, and a green patterned graphic near the rear wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays dual exhausts, taillights, and a yellow license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view features a large Tesla logo and the Coca-Cola roof branding.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
